IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: 63 THOMPSON STREET HDFC WAS ORGANIZED EXCLUSIVELY FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEVELOPING, OWNING AND OPERATING, ON A NON-PROFIT BASIS, A HOUSING PROJECT FOR PERSONS OF LOW INCOME.
IRS990.MissionDesc: 63 THOMPSON STREET HOUSING DEVELOPMENT FUND CORPORATION WAS ORGANIZED EXCLUSIVELY FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEVELOPING, OWNING AND OPERATING, ON A NON-PROFIT BASIS, A HOUSING PROJECT FOR PERSONS OF LOW INCOME.
IRS990.Desc: 63 THOMPSON STREET HOUSING DEVELOPMENT FUND CORPORATION WAS ORGANIZED EXCLUSIVELY FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEVELOPING, OWNING AND OPERATING, ON A NON-PROFIT BASIS, A HOUSING PROJECT FOR PERSONS OF LOW INCOME. It provided 21 affordable housing units during the year.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: GRANT TO PHIPPS HOUSES, AN AFFILIATE ORGANIZATION UNDER IRC 501(C)(4), TO BE USED ONLY FOR THE PURPOSE OF PROMOTING AFFORDABLE HOUSING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: 63 Thompson Street Housing Development Fund Corporation has not taken an unsubstantiated tax position that would require provision of a liability under Accounting Standards Codification ("ASC") No. 740, "Income Taxes,Accounting Standards Update 2009-06, "Implementation Guidance on Accounting for Uncertainty in Income Taxes and Disclosure Amendments for Nonpublic Entities." As of June 30, 2018, the years still subject to audit are fiscal 2015 through 2018.
63 Thompson Street Housing Development Fund Corporation makes contributions only to affiliated not-for-profit entities and only for the purpose of promoting affordable housing.

PHIPPS HOUSES, AN AFFILIATE OF THE REPORTING ORGANIZATION PAID COMPENSATION TO THE REPORTING ORGANIZATION'S TOP MANAGEMENT OFFICIAL. PHIPPS HOUSES HAS ESTABLISHED THE COMPENSATION OF THE TOP MANAGEMENT OFFICIAL USING COMPENSATION COMMITTEE, INDEPENDENT COMPENSATION CONSULTANT, FORM 990 OF OTHER ORGANIZATIONS, COMPENSATION SURVEY OR STUDY, AND APPROVAL BY THE BOARD OR COMPENSATION COMMITTEE.
ADAM WEINSTEIN, PRESIDENT, IS A PARTICIPANT IN A SECTION 457(F) PLAN AND EARNED $50,000 DURING THE REPORTING PERIOD WHICH IS INCLUDED IN SCHEDULE J, PART II, COLUMN (C).

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 6:
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SOLE MEMBER OF THE ORGANIZATION IS PHIPPS HOUSES, A RELATED 501(C)(4) ORGANIZATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7A:
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: AS THE SOLE MEMBER OF THE ORGANIZATION, PHIPPS HOUSES HAS THE RIGHT TO ELECT THE MEMBERS OF THE ORGANIZATION'S BOARD OF DIRECTORS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7B:
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: UNDER NEW YORK STATE LAW, CERTAIN GOVERNANCE DECISIONS REQUIRE MEMBERSHIP APPROVAL.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B:
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: MEMBERS OF THE ORGANIZATION'S GOVERNING BODY REVIEW THE FORM 990 FOR ACCURACY OF CONTENT AND DISCUSS AS NECESSARY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C:
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: OFFICERS AND DIRECTORS MUST COMPLETE AND CERTIFY ANNUALLY A LIST OF CONFLICTS OF INTEREST.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINES 15A AND 15B:
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION DOES NOT COMPENSATE ANY OFFICERS OR KEY EMPLOYEES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19:
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MAKES ITS GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.

THE COMPENSATION OF THE PRESIDENT, VICE PRESIDENTS, SECRETARY AND TREASURER REFLECTS THEIR CONTRIBUTIONS TO NOT ONLY 63 THOMPSON STREET HOUSING DEVELOPMENT FUND CORPORATION BUT TO ALL OF ITS AFFILIATED ENTITIES. ON A CONSOLIDATED BASIS, IN 2017, THE PHIPPS HOUSES GROUP HAD REVENUE OF $180 MILLION AND ASSETS OF $1.3 BILLION.

DisregardedEntityName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: PHIPPS AFFORDABLE HOUSING ADMIN AGENT CO
PHIPPS CDC EARLY CHILDHOOD SERVICES CORP
